title: T-050 — UI: Stock movement & adjustment surfaces — WH-006/007/M-14 (WH §8.1-8.8)
prompt:
# T-050 — UI: Stock movement & adjustment surfaces — WH-006/007/M-14 (WH §8.1-8.8)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §8.1, §8.2, §8.3, §8.5, §8.8, §16.6 WH-006/007/M-14
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx:3-136 (stock_movement_list_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:334-445 (stock_move_modal)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1051-1103 (cycle_count_quick_adjustment_modal)

## Goal
Implement /(app)/warehouse/movements list + Sheet detail + StockMove modal + CycleCount quick-adjust modal + Manager-Approvals tab with 1:1 prototype parity and >10% approval gate.

## Implementation contract
1. RSC list page + client island Sheet on row click (replaces prototype absolute-positioned .mv-side).
2. Stock Move modal with react-hook-form discriminated-union schema per move_type; ≥10% deltaPct triggers 'Submit for approval' button + alert-amber warning.
3. Cycle-count quick-adjust modal: P1-stub banner + delta auto-compute + same approval gate (T-029 service).
4. Manager-Approvals tab listing pending movement_approvals with approve/reject actions (RBAC-gated).
5. All 3 root elements expose `data-prototype-label`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/movements/** [create]
- apps/web/components/warehouse/movements/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Prototype parity
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx:3-136 (stock_movement_list_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:334-445 (stock_move_modal)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:1051-1103 (cycle_count_quick_adjustment_modal)
- Evidence policy: _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /warehouse/movements renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx:3-136 (stock_movement_list_page), then layout, tabs, filter bar, qty color rules match (RTL snapshot).
2. Given the Stock Move modal computes delta>10%, when submit clicked, then button label becomes 'Submit for approval' and the request routes to T-028 approval path.
3. Given the Cycle-Count Quick-Adjust modal opens, when the P1-stub Alert is visible, then it states full WH-E14 is P2 (BL-WH-01).
4. Given a row in stock_movement_list_page is clicked, when expanded, then a shadcn Sheet slides in from the right (not the prototype absolute-positioned .mv-side).

Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a 5th AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F6 2026-05-14).

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright + RTL covering 3 labels, >10% gate, P1-stub banner, Sheet side-panel.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-mov-ui && pnpm playwright test --project=chromium --grep @warehouse-mov-ui`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass the >10% approval gate.
- Do not build the full cycle-count workflow (P2 WH-E14).
- Do not use the prototype absolute-positioned side panel — use shadcn Sheet.

## Dependencies
- T-025
- T-026
- T-027
- T-028
- T-029
